label: The Chromatic Vaults
description: The Chromatic Vaults comprise a rectilinear warehouse complex carved into the city’s glass terraces, its walls faceted to harvest meridian glare into calibrated storage bands. Interior aisles run as straight, shadow-sheathed trenches, while overhead prisms cast fixed color intervals that serve as permanent indexing marks across the floor. Bays of dark crystalline shelving rise in gridded spines that echo the fracture-belt geometry, each surface sealed with resinous vitreous skins against abrasive prismatic dust. Loading courts open on lattice-aligned apertures where refracted light-bridges terminate in hard angles, permitting transfers measured by color and incidence rather than by clock or bell.
